qa_pair.question: What is the season code for Fall 2024 on CourseTable?
What is the earliest academic season available in CourseTable? Give the season label (e.g. "Fall 2009").
What is the season code for Spring 2025 on CourseTable?
What is the full title of the course listed as CPSC 365 in Fall 2024?
How many credits is CPSC 365 worth in Fall 2024?
Who are the two professors teaching CPSC 223 in Fall 2024? List both names separated by a comma.
What is the full title of PHIL 718 offered in Spring 2025?
Who teaches PHIL 718 in Spring 2025?
What is the full title of MATH 225 in Fall 2024?
How many credits is MATH 225 worth in Fall 2024?
What is the average student rating (rounded to one decimal place) of CPSC 365 in Fall 2024?
What Yale distributional area does ENGL 154 satisfy in Fall 2023?
Does ENGL 154 in Fall 2023 satisfy any Yale skill requirement? If so, which one?
Search for courses in Fall 2024 with subject 'CPSC' and title containing 'Algorithms'. Is there a course titled exactly 'Algorithms' in the results?
Search for courses in Fall 2024 with subject 'MATH' and skill 'QR'. Does the result include at least one course?
Search for courses in Fall 2024 with subject 'CPSC' and description containing 'machine learning'. Does at least one result appear?
Look up CPSC 365 in Fall 2024 using get_course_by_code to get the course_id, then call get_course. What season label does get_course return for that course?
Look up CPSC 365 in Fall 2024 via get_course. Does it have a non-null syllabus_url field?
Look up ENGL 154 in Fall 2023 via get_course. What distributional areas does it list?
Call get_course_evaluations for CPSC 365 in Fall 2024. Does it return at least one evaluation entry (even if summary is empty)?
Call get_course_evaluations for CPSC 223 in Fall 2024. Does it return evaluation data (i.e., not the "No evaluation data available" message)?
Call get_evaluation_ratings for CPSC 365 in Fall 2024. Does it return at least one rating distribution entry?
Call get_evaluation_ratings for CPSC 365 in Fall 2024. Does the response include a question about overall assessment of the course (i.e. a question_text mentioning "assessment" or "recommend")?
Search for professor 'Spielman'. What is the full name of the first result?
Search for professor 'Glenn'. Is there a result with name 'James Glenn'?
Compare CPSC 223 and CPSC 365 from Fall 2024 using compare_courses. Do both courses have 1 credit?
Compare CPSC 223 and CPSC 365 from Fall 2024 using compare_courses. Which course has a higher average overall rating?
Does list_majors return a major with slug 'computer-science'?
Does list_majors return a major with slug 'mathematics'?
Does get_major_requirements for slug 'computer-science' mention CPSC 3650 as a required course?
According to get_major_requirements for slug 'mathematics', is MATH 2250 (Linear Algebra with proofs) listed as a requirement?
Does get_catalog_metadata return a JSON object containing a 'last_update' field with a non-empty string value?
Does get_user_info return a JSON object with a 'netId' field?
Does get_user_info return a 'hasEvals' boolean field?
Does get_worksheets return a JSON object (not an error message) when called with a valid CourseTable cookie?
Does get_wishlist return a JSON array (possibly empty) rather than an error message?

Use get_course_by_code to find the CRN for CPSC 365 in Fall 2024. Then add that course to the wishlist via update_wishlist_course (action='add', season='202403'). Then call get_wishlist and check that the CRN is present. Finally remove it via update_wishlist_course (action='remove'). Did the course appear in the wishlist after adding and disappear after removing?

Use get_course_by_code to find the CRN for CPSC 365 in Fall 2024. Add that CRN to worksheet 0 for season '202403' via update_worksheet_course (action='add', color='#1a73e8', hidden=false). Call get_worksheets and verify the CRN appears in worksheet 0 for season 202403. Then remove it via update_worksheet_course (action='remove'). Did the course appear in the worksheet after adding and disappear after removing?

Create a new worksheet named 'Eval Test' for season '202403' using update_worksheet_metadata (action='add'). Then call get_worksheets and confirm a worksheet named 'Eval Test' exists for season 202403. Then delete that worksheet using update_worksheet_metadata (action='delete') with the returned worksheetNumber. Did the worksheet appear after creation and disappear after deletion?
Call get_friends_worksheets with mode='list_friends'. Does the response include a 'count' field and a 'friends' array?

Use get_course_by_code to find CPSC 365 in Fall 2024 and obtain its syllabus_url. Call get_syllabus_content with that URL. Does it return non-empty syllabus text (not an auth error or "appears empty" message)?

Call get_degree_audit with default parameters (school='UG', degree='BA', include_courses=true). Does the response include a 'student' object with a 'gpa' field and a non-empty 'requirement_blocks' array?
Does list_certificates return a certificate with slug 'french'?
Does list_certificates return a certificate with slug 'climate-science-and-solutions'?
Call get_curriculum_info with section='distributional-requirements'. Does the response mention "Quantitative Reasoning"?
Call get_curriculum_info with section='distributional-requirements'. Does it list Writing (WR) as one of the distributional requirements?
Call get_curriculum_info with section='invalid-section'. Does the response include an error message listing valid sections rather than returning catalog content?
